badge: Technical partner for websites that should generate trust, leads and sales
description: I build landing pages, company websites, e-commerce projects and web apps for businesses that need more than a polished presence online. The goal is a digital asset ready for trust, traffic, SEO, ads and growth.

manifesto.label: Positioning
manifesto.title: Commercial website logic, not freelance filler.
manifesto.body: Positioning, structure, development and launch are assembled as one system aimed at business impact.

proof.label: What matters
proof.body: Not just a polished site, but a digital asset ready for traffic, trust and conversion.
